import io
import string

fn parse_two(_ s: String) -> Option<Int>
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut a = 0
  mut b = 0
  mut have_a = false
  mut have_b = false
  mut in_num = false
  mut current = 0
  mut which = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(c)
      if c >= 48 and c <= 57
        if not in_num
          in_num = true
          current = 0
        end
        current = current * 10 + (c - 48)
      else
        if in_num
          if which == 0
            a = current
            have_a = true
            which = 1
          else
            b = current
            have_b = true
          end
          in_num = false
        end
      end
    when None
      i = n
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_num
    if which == 0
      a = current
      have_a = true
    else
      b = current
      have_b = true
    end
  end
  if have_a and have_b
    Some(a * 1000000000000 + b)
  else
    None
  end
end

fn gcd(_ a: Int, _ b: Int) -> Int
  mut x = a
  mut y = b
  while y != 0
    let r = x % y
    x = y
    y = r
  end
  x
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut i = 0
  mut nums = [0, 0]
  mut idx = 0
  mut current = 0
  mut in_num = false
  while i < n and idx < 2
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(c)
      if c >= 48 and c <= 57
        if not in_num
          in_num = true
          current = 0
        end
        current = current * 10 + (c - 48)
      else
        if in_num
          nums = [if idx == 0 current else nums[0] end, if idx == 1 current else nums[1] end]
          idx = idx + 1
          in_num = false
        end
      end
    when None
      i = n
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_num and idx < 2
    nums = [if idx == 0 current else nums[0] end, if idx == 1 current else nums[1] end]
    idx = idx + 1
  end
  let g = gcd(nums[0], nums[1])
  println("gcd=#{g}")
end
